alerts.title: Others Category Exploded 1,484% This Month
alerts.description: The 'Others' category surged from ₹45,029.74 last month to ₹7,13,331.98 this month — a 1,484% increase. The bulk of this is driven by unclassified UPI transactions (₹4,69,909.89 across 47 transactions) and a suspicious ₹99,999 entry labelled 'View: Account Update For Your HDFC Bank'.

alerts.title: Suspicious ₹99,999 HDFC Bank 'Account Update' Transaction
alerts.description: A single ₹99,999 payment to 'View: Account Update For Your HDFC Bank' was made this month with only 1 occurrence. This phrasing is a common pattern in UPI phishing and bank fraud scams — verify this transaction immediately with HDFC Bank.

alerts.title: Food & Dining Jumped 75% Over Last Month
alerts.description: Food & Dining spending rose from ₹5,150.84 to ₹9,008.75 this month, driven by Zomato (₹4,027.75 across 5 orders) and Blinkit (₹4,981 across 3 orders). This is also 21% above your 3-month average of ₹7,423.06.

alerts.title: Shopping Spend Up 169% With a ₹6,004 Single Amazon Transaction
alerts.description: Shopping rose from ₹5,130.99 to ₹13,830.56 this month, significantly above your 3-month average of ₹14,596.67. A single ₹6,004 Amazon Pay e-commerce transaction accounts for a large portion — confirm this was intentional.

tips: Audit the 47 unclassified UPI transactions totalling ₹4,69,909.89 immediately — tag or categorise each one so your actual spending picture is visible; currently over 96% of this month's total is unaccounted for.

Dispute or verify the ₹99,999 'Account Update For Your HDFC Bank' payment — legitimate banks never request payments via UPI for account updates; if fraudulent, file a complaint at cybercrime.gov.in and with HDFC within 24 hours.

Your Zomato and Blinkit combined spend was ₹9,008.75 this month against a 3-month Food & Dining average of ₹7,423.06. Setting a monthly cap of ₹6,500 on these two apps alone could save you ₹2,500+ per month.

You made 3 separate Amazon Pay transactions (₹6,004 + ₹1,960 + ₹5,866.56 across grocery) totalling ₹13,830.56 this month. Consolidating orders and using Amazon Subscribe & Save for grocery staples could reduce this by 10–15%, saving approximately ₹1,300 monthly.

Your Entertainment spend dropped to just ₹505 this month versus a 3-month average of ₹2,188.43 — yet you still have a Google Play subscription at ₹429/month. Review active Google Play subscriptions to ensure you are not paying for apps you are no longer using, as your Entertainment usage is at its lowest in 3 months.
